word: G3951 - παροτρύνω - parotrýnō - par-ot-roo'-no - Stir up

sections.paragraph:
- Original: παροτρύνω

- Transliteration: Parotruno

- Phonetic: par-ot-roo'-no

- Definition:

1. to incite, stir up

- Origin: from G3844 and otruno (to spur)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G3844 and ὀτρύνω otrunō (to spur); to urge along that is stimulate (to hostility): - stir up.
